---
title: Effective Connectivity Identifies Divergent Cerebro-Cerebellar Network Organization in Schizophrenia
pres_group: publications
date: '2026-03-23'
description: Kami Pearson, Katrina Aberizk, Cindy An, Grace Hodges, Theo GM van Erp, Vince D Calhoun, Jessica A Turner
page-layout: full
---

Pearson, K., Aberizk, K., An, C. et al. Effective Connectivity Identifies Divergent Cerebro-Cerebellar Network Organization in Schizophrenia. Cerebellum 25, 38 (2026). https://doi.org/10.1007/s12311-026-01983-7
